notes: This file is a witness-parametric scaffold for the isogeny base-change API, with no sorries and no maxHeartbeats overrides; many leaf declarations (mkBaseChange_pullback, cross_compose_zPi_witness, qf_nonneg_from_polarisation_witness, etc.) are unused within the file and serve as API entry points for external consumers in the Hasse-bound cascade. The frobeniusIsog_relative_iterate def and cross_compose_zPi_witness are the only proofs exceeding 30 lines, and the heavy use of cast on type equalities for Frobenius constructions is a fragility note.
